section_miscategorizations.text: Dragon shows a creatinine of 0.8 and an EKG with normal intervals.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The clinical content (creatinine and EKG results) is appropriate for Findings, but the inclusion of the dictation-system reference ('Dragon shows') is non-clinical metadata that would more properly be omitted or placed in a technical/documentation note rather than the clinical Findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Prescribe Coreg 25 milligrams twice daily and Carvedilol 25 milligrams twice daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Coreg is the brand name for carvedilol; listing both as if they are separate prescriptions in the Plan section is internally contradictory and could mislead a reader into thinking two different medications are being ordered. While the section is correct, the duplicated/discordant content within the Plan represents a clinically misleading organization of the medication plan.
